Title: Successful user sign-up and login
Preconditions:
- System is running; no existing user with test credentials.
- Internet/geolocation services enabled.
Test Data:
- Valid email: `testuser@example.com`
- Strong password: `SecurePass123!`
- Valid geolocation: `40.7128° N, 74.0060° W` (New York)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to sign-up page.
2. Enter `testuser@example.com`, `SecurePass123!`, and confirm password.
3. Select geolocation (e.g., New York).
4. Click "Sign Up."
5. Verify redirect to login page.
6. Enter `testuser@example.com` and `SecurePass123!`.
7. Click "Login."
8. Verify redirection to dashboard (`Bacheca`).
Expected Result:
- User account created successfully in DB (Page 10).
- Login successful; dashboard loads with geolocalized announcements (Page 1).
- No errors in console/logs.

Title: Failed sign-up due to duplicate email
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to sign-up page.
2. Enter `duplicate@example.com`, `Password123!`, and confirm.
3. Click "Sign Up."
4. Observe error message.
Expected Result:
- System detects duplicate email (Page 2: "Utente creato?" → "Sì").
- Error: "Email already registered." displayed.
- No new user created in DB (Page 10).

Title: Invalid login credentials
Preconditions: - Existing user with email `validuser@example.com` and password `ValidPass123`.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to login page.
2. Enter `wrong@example.com` and `WrongPass123`.
3. Click "Login."
4. Observe error message.
Expected Result:
- System rejects login (Page 2: "Utente creato?" → "No" → "CreateUser" fails).
- Error: "Invalid email or password." displayed.
- No dashboard access granted.

Title: Geolocation-based announcement filtering
Preconditions:
- User logged in with geolocation set to `Milan, Italy`.
- At least 3 announcements exist: 1 in Milan, 1 in Rome, 1 expired.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to dashboard (`Bacheca`).
2. Select "Filtraggio Annunci" (Page 1).
3. Apply filter: "Location = Milan" (Page 5).
4. Verify filtered list (Page 12: `ListWithFilter`).
5. Click on Milan announcement to view details.
Expected Result:
- Only Milan announcement appears in list (Page 5: `Filtro corretto?` → "Sì").
- Rome/expired announcements excluded.
- Details page loads correctly (Page 6: `NoticeboardDetails`).

Title: Successful announcement creation
Test Data:
- Title: "Laptop for Sale"
- Description: "Used MacBook Pro, 16GB RAM"
- Location: `New York`
- Start Date: `2023-12-01`
- End Date: `2023-12-31`
Test Steps:
1. Click "CREAZIONE ANNUNCIO" (Page 1).
2. Fill form with test data.
3. Click "Submit."
4. Verify redirection to `NoticeboardCreated` (Page 4).
5. Check DB for new record (Page 11).
Expected Result:
- Announcement saved in DB (Page 11: `Save data`).
- User sees confirmation message.
- Announcement appears in user’s `MyActivities` (Page 7).

Title: Failed announcement creation (invalid dates)
Test Data:
- Start Date: `2024-01-01`
- End Date: `2023-12-31` (end before start)
Test Steps:
1. Click "CREAZIONE ANNUNCIO."
2. Enter invalid dates.
3. Click "Submit."
4. Observe error.
Expected Result:
- System rejects submission (Page 4: `Creazione avvenuta?` → "No").
- Error: "End date must be after start date."
- No DB entry created (Page 11).

Title: Announcement lifecycle (creation → booking → acceptance)
Preconditions:
- User A creates an announcement (state: `Created`).
- User B logs in.
Test Steps:
1. User A creates announcement (Page 9: `Created` → `Booking`).
2. User B views announcement (Page 12: `Show noticeboard`).
3. User B books announcement (Page 6: `Booking`).
4. User A accepts booking (Page 13: `Accept` → `Accepted`).
5. Verify state transitions in DB.
Expected Result:
- States progress: `Created` → `Booking` → `Accept` → `Accepted` (Page 9).
- User B sees booking confirmation.
- User A sees accepted booking in `MyActivities`.

Title: Automatic announcement deletion after expiration
Test Steps:
1. System checks for expired announcements (Page 16: `If Noticeboard's period finished`).
2. Verify deletion from DB.
3. User logs in and navigates to `MyActivities`.
Expected Result:
- Expired announcement deleted (Page 16: `Delete Noticeboard`).
- Announcement no longer visible in lists.
- No errors in logs.

Title: Profile modification (update email)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to `MyProfile` (Page 3).
2. Click "Modify Account" (Page 1).
3. Enter `newemail@example.com`.
4. Click "Save."
5. Verify DB update (Page 15: `Modify data`).
6. Log out and log back in with new email.
Expected Result:
- Email updated in DB (Page 15).
- User can log in with `newemail@example.com`.
- Old email no longer works.

Title: Profile modification (invalid email format)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to `MyProfile`.
2. Click "Modify Account."
3. Enter `invalid.email`.
4. Click "Save."
5. Observe error.
Expected Result:
- System rejects invalid format (Page 8: `ModifyAccount` fails).
- Error: "Please enter a valid email."
- No DB changes (Page 15).

Title: Successful announcement reservation
Preconditions:
- User A creates an announcement (state: `Created`).
- User B logs in.
Test Steps:
1. User B views announcement (Page 5: `ListWithFilter`).
2. Clicks "Prenotazione Annuncio" (Page 1).
3. Confirms reservation (Page 6: `Vuoi prenotarti?` → "Sì").
4. User A accepts reservation (Page 13: `Accept`).
Expected Result:
- Reservation recorded in DB (Page 12: `Booking`).
- User B sees confirmation.
- Announcement state: `Accepted` (Page 9).

Title: Reservation cancellation before acceptance
Preconditions: - User B reserves User A’s announcement (state: `Booking`).
Test Steps:
1. User B navigates to `MyActivities`.
2. Clicks "Cancel Reservation."
3. User A checks `MyActivities`.
Expected Result:
- Reservation cancelled (state reverts to `Created`).
- User A sees announcement as unbooked.
- No points assigned (Page 9: `PointsAssignment` skipped).

Title: Logout from dashboard
Test Steps:
1. Click "Logout" from lateral menu (Page 3: `Eseguire il logout?` → "Sì").
2. Verify redirection to login page.
3. Attempt to access `MyProfile` without login.
Expected Result:
- Session terminated (Page 1: `LOGOUT`).
- Redirect to login page.
- Access to `MyProfile` denied (Page 3: `Accesso a menu laterale` → "No").

Title: Concurrent announcement modification
Preconditions:
- User A creates announcement.
- User B logs in and modifies same announcement simultaneously.
Test Steps:
1. User A opens announcement for edit (Page 14: `Check if noticeboard exist`).
2. User B opens same announcement and saves changes.
3. User A attempts to save conflicting changes.
Expected Result:
- System detects conflict (Page 14: `Modify data` fails).
- Error: "Announcement modified by another user. Please refresh."
- User A sees latest version.

Title: Geolocation service unavailable
Test Steps:
1. User signs up without geolocation.
2. Logs in and navigates to `FILTRAGGIO ANNUNCI`.
3. Attempts to apply location filter.
Expected Result:
- System falls back to default location (e.g., "Unknown").
- Filter applies to all announcements (Page 5: `ListNoFilter`).
- Warning: "Geolocation unavailable. Showing all announcements."

Title: Maximum announcement limit reached
Test Steps:
1. User attempts to create 101st announcement.
2. System validates limit.
Expected Result:
- Error: "Maximum announcements (100) reached."
- No new announcement created (Page 4: `CreateNoticeboard` blocked).
- User sees limit notification in `MyActivities`.
